id.description: Unique identifier — required for label association and ARIA wiring.

name.description: Native form field name. Emits one hidden input per selected id.

label.description: Visible label rendered in a `<label>` associated via `for`.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text when nothing is selected.

description.description: Helper text displayed below the trigger; wired via aria-describedby.

warning.description: Warning text rendered below the control and included in aria-describedby.

disabled.description: Disables the control. Inherited from a wrapping FormField when unset.

readonly.description: Prevents changing selection while still allowing viewing current selections.

required.description: Marks the field required and shows the required marker on the label.

filterable.description: Enables the filter input rendered above the options list.

selectionFeedback.description: Selected-option ordering behavior when the menu is open.

direction.description: Open direction for the floating panel.

unsupportedProps.name: filterItem
unsupportedProps.description: Custom option filter callback. Defaults to case-insensitive label/description matching.

unsupportedProps.name: items
unsupportedProps.description: Full option set. The sole inference source for T.
